notes: Product-surface work only; full-text scan of protocol/claims/registry.json found no claim_id covering the indexer or CLI surfaces, so no local_implementation_state changes are proposed. Delivered: (1) noos-indexer live ingestion — new ingest module subscribing to the noos-node operator line protocol (GET /status, /block/<h>, /receipt/<txid>, bearer auth, exact rpc.rs wire shapes) with exact-height resume via a persisted ingest-checkpoint-v1.json (next_height + bounded 64-point (height,hash) tail), reorg-safe rollback that deletes exactly the orphaned block/tx rows back to the deepest retained common ancestor, fail-closed wrong-chain rejection before any write, fail-closed ReorgBeyondCheckpoint when a fork predates the retained tail, and no inferred finality (only the unsafe head advances; justified/finalized move solely via ingest_head). Tests: crates/noos-indexer/tests/ingest.rs (fork replaces prior head rows exactly; restart requests exactly the next height; wrong-chain writes nothing; deep-fork fails closed; LineProtocolSource ingests a node-shaped TCP feed incl. receipts; bad bearer token fails closed). (2) NEW crates/noos-cli — keygen (noos-wallet HKDF law; secrets never printed; golden against all 30 ODR-WALLET-001 derivation vectors via blake3(public_id) and ed25519 verifying-key reconstruction), tx build (canonical TransactionV1; byte-identical to lumen-tx-v1 tx_minimal/tx_full/tx_no_sponsor vectors; witness_root computed from lock reveals, never user-supplied), tx sign (identity-gated wallet signing of the txid; independently ed25519-verified over the SIGNING_DOMAIN||chain||genesis||api||txid message; rejects all whole-tx negative lumen vectors with matching error classes; fails closed on witness_root mismatch), tx submit/status (node line protocol; /status identity handshake BEFORE bytes leave the machine — wrong chain aborts with only /status on the wire), query (frozen indexer API v1, verified against the real noos-indexer router serving a live-ingested block). Verification: cargo test -p noos-indexer -p noos-cli = 21 passed; cargo clippy -p <both> --all-targets -D warnings clean; cargo fmt clean; python tools/gates/check_api.py PASS.
